# textProvider

**Instance Property**

The text to display below the view.

## Declaration

```swift
@_NilHidden<CLKTextProvider> @objc final var textProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property supports multicolor text.

## Accessing the Content

- **content**: The SwiftUI view displayed by the template.
